headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Independence Day Sale
content:
Commemorate a milestone Independence Day in GTA Online with our biggest sale ever, including:

- Mammoth Avenger (Plane) – 70% off
- B-11 Strikeforce (Plane) – 70% off
- Agencies – 60% off
- Hangars – 60% off
- Bunkers – 40% off
- Benefactor Terrorbyte – 70% off
- Declasse Scramjet (Super) – 60% off
- Übermacht Sentinel GTS (Sports) – 50% off

And more! Check out the Rockstar Newswire for details.
